session_summary: Developed SSR-safe atomic CSS-in-JS composable use_css with pseudo-class support, CSS property autocomplete, and rem utilities for a Nuxt 4 project
user_goals: Make it SSR-safe, dynamic, and optimized
Add CSS property autocomplete via Vue CSSProperties type
key_decisions: use_css uses useState + useHead for SSR-safe CSS injection
Class names generated by FNV-1a hash: gla_${hash}
Pseudo keys checked at runtime via Set before recursive descent
insertRule wrapped in try/catch for safety
Css_Rule uses intersection of CSSProperties + Css_Pseudo for autocomplete
build is NOT reliable for error checking (can build error page)
Tailwind-style approach with separate style in head and dynamic class generation
Russian comments style in code (WHAT not WHY)
critical_constraints: Never use bun run build as error check
Do not add emojis unless asked
Never fabricate facts, paths, package names
